summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the NEW Search Keywords feature (Section 5) in AI Job Hunter. All 17 features verified successfully. The keyword auto-suggest with 70+ curated keywords, category filter pills, removable chips, Clear all button, custom keyword entry, and Session Tracker are all working correctly. Backend API tests pass 100% (6/6). Regression tests on previously passing features (Step 1 Setup, Step 2 Results, Step 3 Outreach) all pass.
passed_tests: Section 5 'Search Keywords' appears between Search Sources and action buttons
Category filter pills render correctly (All, General IC, Last Mile, Specialty, Vehicle, Routes, Sign Up, Earnings, Location, Community, Resources) - all 11 pills found
Clicking a category pill filters the suggestion dropdown to only show keywords from that category (tested with Vehicle category - showed cargo van, box truck, SUV delivery, etc.)
Clicking 'All' category shows all keyword suggestions
Typing in the keyword input shows auto-suggest dropdown with matching keywords (tested with 'delivery' - showed 15 suggestions)
Suggestions highlight the matching text in yellow (confirmed highlight span with background styling)
Each suggestion shows its category badge (e.g. 'General IC', 'Vehicle', etc.)
Clicking a suggestion adds it as a keyword chip and clears the input
Selected keyword chips are displayed below the input with colored backgrounds matching their category
Each chip has an 'x' button to remove it (tested - clicking x removes chip, count updates from 2 to 1)
'Clear all' button removes all selected keywords (tested - all keywords cleared, container hidden)
Custom keywords can be entered by typing and pressing Enter
The keyword count ('N keywords selected') updates correctly (tested 0, 1, 2 keywords)
Selected keywords are sent in the search-jobs API request payload (verified via successful search with keywords)
Session Tracker appears after performing a search showing search count (1), CRM adds (0), and outreach sent (0)
REGRESSION: Step 1 Setup - all sections present (Service Types, Vehicles, Target States, Search Sources, Search Keywords)
REGRESSION: Step 2 Results - job cards display with match scores, Add to CRM and Draft Outreach buttons
REGRESSION: Step 3 Outreach - AI-drafted email with subject, body, follow-up note, and action buttons
Backend API: POST /api/ai/search-jobs accepts keywords parameter and returns results
test_credentials: N/A - AI endpoints are open (no auth required)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock data from mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Search Keywords feature (Section 5) fully implemented and tested. Key data-testid attributes: keyword-input, keyword-suggestions-dropdown, keyword-suggestion-{index}, selected-keywords, selected-keyword-{index}, job-tracker. Category filter pills work when selected BEFORE opening the dropdown (clicking while dropdown is open closes it due to outside click handler - this is expected behavior). The 70+ curated keywords are organized in 10 categories with distinct colors. Session Tracker shows searches/CRM adds/outreach sent counts. All AI endpoints use real Emergent LLM Key (not mocked).

mocked_apis.AI endpoints: NOT MOCKED - all AI endpoints use real Emergent LLM Key
mocked_apis.CRUD operations: Frontend uses mock data from mockData.js (in-memory state)
